item.description: After strikes resumed between the U.S. and Iran, Sen. Roger Marshall (R-Kan.) tells Meet the Press he doesn’t believe the conflict is “over” as the Trump administration claims but believes the "major" part of the war is finished.

media:content.media:title: GOP Sen. Marshall says additional U.S. strikes in Iran just ‘mop-up operation’: Full interview
media:content.media:description: After strikes resumed between the U.S. and Iran, Sen. Roger Marshall (R-Kan.) tells Meet the Press he doesn’t believe the conflict is “over” as the Trump administration claims but believes the "major" part of the war is finished.

item.title: GOP Sen. Marshall says additional U.S. strikes in Iran just ‘mop-up operation’: Full interview

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
item.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

media:content.media:text: Photo Illustration of graduates, Trump, and money.
media:content.media:description: The federal student loan system will undergo major changes under President Donald Trump's "big beautiful, bill."

item.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The gloomy, overcast weather on Saturday didn’t disturb visitors who attended the first weekend of President Donald Trump’s Great American State Fair, an event commemorating America’s 250th anniversary on the National Mall.

media:content.media:text: A man in a shirt with stars and stripes of the American flag stands in front of a Ferris Wheel at sunset.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: People walking in front of a long line of signs bearing U.S. state names on the National Mall in Washington.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A "Welcome to Las Vegas" sign in a booth.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A boy stands in front of a cardboard cutout of Abraham Lincoln in a booth decorated in red, white and blue.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: People sheltering from the sun under cardboard American flag signs.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: President Trump holds both hands out while speaking at a lectern.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A foal lying in a dirt paddock in front of a Ferris Wheel.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

item.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Rudy Chinchilla
item.description: After six World Cup selections, more than 150 national team games, and an Olympic bronze medal, Ochoa is hanging up his gloves.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Czechia v Mexico: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico during the Czechia v Mexico match.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa, Goalkeeper for Mexico reacts during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Czechia and Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa's teammates toss him tossed into the air after Mexico's 3-0 victory over Czechia in a World Cup group match Wednesday in Mexico City.

item.title: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa’s emotional farewell leaves lasting legacy for Mexico fans

item.description: Canadá hace historia al clasificarse a la siguiente ronda y los aficionados vivieron al máximo el gol agónico de Stephen Eustáquio al minuto 92. Reacciones de gozo y alivio por parte del banquillo canadiense.

media:content.media:title: Así se vivió el triunfo dramático de Canadá ante Sudáfrica
media:content.media:description: Canadá hace historia al clasificarse a la siguiente ronda y los aficionados vivieron al máximo el gol agónico de Stephen Eustáquio al minuto 92. Reacciones de gozo y alivio por parte del banquillo canadiense.

item.title: Así se vivió el triunfo dramático de Canadá ante Sudáfrica

item.description: En un partido en el que Sudáfrica plantó cara, apareció el mediocampista del LAFC para adelantar a Canadá, uno de los tres países anfitriones que busca avanzar en esta fase de eliminación directa de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Stephen Eustáquio marca un golazo y adelanta a Canadá ante Sudáfrica en los dieciseisavos de final
media:content.media:description: En un partido en el que Sudáfrica plantó cara, apareció el mediocampista del LAFC para adelantar a Canadá, uno de los tres países anfitriones que busca avanzar en esta fase de eliminación directa de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Stephen Eustáquio marca un golazo y adelanta a Canadá ante Sudáfrica en los dieciseisavos de final

item.description: Revive el inolvidable gol de volea de James Rodríguez frente a Uruguay en los octavos de final de Brasil 2014. Una obra de arte que impulsó a Colombia al triunfo 2-0 y quedó grabada entre los mejores goles en la historia de los Mundiales.

media:content.media:title: El día que James Rodríguez marcó un gol para la historia | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Revive el inolvidable gol de volea de James Rodríguez frente a Uruguay en los octavos de final de Brasil 2014. Una obra de arte que impulsó a Colombia al triunfo 2-0 y quedó grabada entre los mejores goles en la historia de los Mundiales.

item.title: El día que James Rodríguez marcó un gol para la historia | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Guillermo Ochoa repasa el camino que lo llevó a disputar seis Copas del Mundo y confiesa que vive con emoción sus últimos partidos con México. El arquero recuerda los sacrificios detrás de una marca histórica y el orgullo de jugar un Mundial en casa.

media:content.media:title: Memo Ochoa: “Disfruto mis últimos momentos con la Selección” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Guillermo Ochoa repasa el camino que lo llevó a disputar seis Copas del Mundo y confiesa que vive con emoción sus últimos partidos con México. El arquero recuerda los sacrificios detrás de una marca histórica y el orgullo de jugar un Mundial en casa.

item.title: Memo Ochoa: “Disfruto mis últimos momentos con la Selección” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Jorge Valdano elogia el gran momento de Argentina y de Lionel Messi, pero advierte que Cabo Verde merece respeto tras sorprender a España y Uruguay durante el Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Valdano lanza una advertencia sobre Argentina y Cabo Verde | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jorge Valdano elogia el gran momento de Argentina y de Lionel Messi, pero advierte que Cabo Verde merece respeto tras sorprender a España y Uruguay durante el Mundial.

item.title: Valdano lanza una advertencia sobre Argentina y Cabo Verde | Vive el Mundial

item.description: La Selección de Sudáfrica pone los motores en marcha para estar listos ante Canadá, buscan sorprender al mundo consiguiendo un triunfo histórico ante los anfitriones.

media:content.media:title: Sudáfrica afina los últimos detalles para el reto más importante ante Canadá
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Sudáfrica pone los motores en marcha para estar listos ante Canadá, buscan sorprender al mundo consiguiendo un triunfo histórico ante los anfitriones.

item.title: Sudáfrica afina los últimos detalles para el reto más importante ante Canadá

item.description: La Selección Canadá llegó al Los Angeles Stadium en Inglewood, California, para enfrentar a Sudáfrica en un histórico duelo de dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™.

media:content.media:title: Canadá llega al estadio para enfrentar a Sudáfrica en los dieciseisavos
media:content.media:description: La Selección Canadá llegó al Los Angeles Stadium en Inglewood, California, para enfrentar a Sudáfrica en un histórico duelo de dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™.

item.title: Canadá llega al estadio para enfrentar a Sudáfrica en los dieciseisavos

item.description: Canadá ya está lista para su mayor reto futbolístico, la ronda de eliminación ante Sudáfrica. El cuadro de la hoja de maple quiere trascender en la Copa Mundial y ser la revelación del torneo.

media:content.media:title: Canadá se prepara para hacer historia al enfrentar a Sudáfrica en 16vos
media:content.media:description: Canadá ya está lista para su mayor reto futbolístico, la ronda de eliminación ante Sudáfrica. El cuadro de la hoja de maple quiere trascender en la Copa Mundial y ser la revelación del torneo.

item.title: Canadá se prepara para hacer historia al enfrentar a Sudáfrica en 16vos

item.description: Los Bafana Bafana debutan en la ronda de eliminación ante la anfitriona Canadá que también quiere hacer historia, sin nada que perder, Sudáfrica llega bailando y cantando en la unidad de un equipo con esperanza.

media:content.media:title: Sudáfrica llega a Los Ángeles poniendo a bailar a todos con su gran ritmo
media:content.media:description: Los Bafana Bafana debutan en la ronda de eliminación ante la anfitriona Canadá que también quiere hacer historia, sin nada que perder, Sudáfrica llega bailando y cantando en la unidad de un equipo con esperanza.

item.title: Sudáfrica llega a Los Ángeles poniendo a bailar a todos con su gran ritmo

item.description: Jesse Marsch, entrenador de la selección canadiense sabe que debe mejorar el manejo del balón, sus labores defensivas y el orden táctico para poder superar a Sudáfrica en la fase eliminatoria directa del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Moïse Bombito regresa al once de Canadá para fortalecer el equipo en la eliminatoria ante Sudáfrica
media:content.media:description: Jesse Marsch, entrenador de la selección canadiense sabe que debe mejorar el manejo del balón, sus labores defensivas y el orden táctico para poder superar a Sudáfrica en la fase eliminatoria directa del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Moïse Bombito regresa al once de Canadá para fortalecer el equipo en la eliminatoria ante Sudáfrica

item.dc:creator: Christine Rapp
item.description: An intense and prolonged heat wave is expected to grip parts of the central and eastern United States ahead of Independence Day celebrations, with 111 million people now under heat alerts this week

media:content.media:text: Extreme heat warning in New York
media:content.media:description: People walk along the Brooklyn Bridge during an extreme heat warning in New York, on July 25, 2025.

item.title: Dangerous heat wave to scorch U.S. ahead of July Fourth

item.dc:creator: Bracey Harris
item.description: Before the outcry, before the demands for justice, before he was placed inside a small casket with a stuffed Bluey, a family had looked forward to sharing simple moments with Kohen Wiley, who was just months away from his second birthday and named by his maternal grandma.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with balloons and stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A triptych image from a funeral in Mississippi.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A group of people standing in the shade of tall trees in front of a brick building.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A man, seen from the neck down, with his arms around his two sons.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A steel water tower appears behind a highway road sign at dusk.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Warm light falls across an asphalt parking lot at sunset.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

item.title: Family of 1-year-old boy fatally shot by Mississippi police says goodbye

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 may be over, but some of the deals aren’t. Here are the best sales still live, including Medicube, Oura Ring, Apple and more editor favorites.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is over, but I found 131+ deals still available — shop before you miss them

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: California authorities unearthed at least 117 dogs in “various states of decomposition” on Friday, many of which appeared to have been killed by gunshot, as part of an ongoing investigation into an animal rescue organization

media:content.media:text: Investigators search Miranda's Rescue as part of an active investigation into alleged animal cruelty, fraud and theft, in Fortuna, CA, on June 23, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Authorities at Miranda's Rescue as part of an ongoing investigation into alleged animal cruelty, fraud and theft, in Fortuna, Calif. last week.

media:content.media:text: Investigators search for animal remains while executing a second search warrant at Miranda's Rescue.
media:content.media:description: Authorities at Miranda's Rescue as part of an ongoing investigation into alleged animal cruelty, fraud and theft, in Fortuna, Calif. last week.

item.title: At least 117 dead dogs found in search at a California animal rescue

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Maya Rosenberg
item.description: Two women and a toddler were found dead Saturday night at a Jackson, Mississippi home, according to the Jackson Police Department.

media:content.media:text: Jackson Police Department investigating a triple homicide in the 300 block of Queen Alexandria Lane in Jackson, MS on Sunday, June 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Jackson Police Department investigating a triple homicide in the 300 block of Queen Alexandria Lane in Jackson, MS on Sunday, June 28, 2026.

item.title: Two women and a toddler fatally shot in Jackson, Mississippi

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The gloomy, overcast weather on Saturday didn’t disturb visitors who attended the first weekend of President Donald Trump’s Great American State Fair, an event commemorating America’s 250th anniversary on the National Mall.

media:content.media:text: A man in a shirt with stars and stripes of the American flag stands in front of a Ferris Wheel at sunset.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: People walking in front of a long line of signs bearing U.S. state names on the National Mall in Washington.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A "Welcome to Las Vegas" sign in a booth.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A boy stands in front of a cardboard cutout of Abraham Lincoln in a booth decorated in red, white and blue.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: People sheltering from the sun under cardboard American flag signs.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: President Trump holds both hands out while speaking at a lectern.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A foal lying in a dirt paddock in front of a Ferris Wheel.
media:content.media:description: The sun sets against a replica of the President Trump's planned Triumphal Arch and a 110-foot "Freedom 250" Ferris wheel at the "Great American State Fair" on Thursday.

item.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
item.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

media:content.media:text: Photo Illustration of graduates, Trump, and money.
media:content.media:description: The federal student loan system will undergo major changes under President Donald Trump's "big beautiful, bill."

item.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: George Russell won the Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix on Sunday, narrowing his deficit in the world championship standings

media:content.media:text: Mercedes' Italian driver Kimi Antonelli at the Formula One Austrian Grand Prix at the Red Bull Ring race track in Spielberg, Austria.
media:content.media:description: George Russell of the Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team celebrating his win following the FIA Formula One World Championship GP Formula 1 Lenovo Austrian Grand Prix in Spielberg, Austria on Sunday.

item.title: George Russell strikes back to win F1 race in Austria, narrowing the championship gap
